elements.name: Deprive no magus of magical power
elements.summary: A magus will not deprive (or attempt to deprive) another member of magical power.
elements.as_thread: Someone's magic was stolen, bound, or threatened — a Code crime to judge.

elements.name: Slay no sodalis (save Wizard's War)
elements.summary: A magus will not slay or attempt to slay a fellow magus, except by formally declared Wizard's War.
elements.wants: Keep killing among magi lawful and rare.
elements.as_thread: A killing — or a declared Wizard's War — demands a reckoning.

elements.name: Endanger not the Order
elements.summary: A magus will not endanger the Order through their actions.
elements.wants: Keep the Order safe and hidden.
elements.as_thread: A reckless act risks exposing or endangering the Order.

elements.name: Interfere not with mundanes (so as to bring ruin)
elements.summary: A magus will not interfere with mundanes so as to bring ruin upon their sodales; serving as a court wizard has been ruled a violation.
elements.wants: Keep magi out of mundane power that would imperil others.
elements.as_thread: A magus' mundane dealings threaten ruin on the covenant.

elements.name: Deal not with devils
elements.summary: A magus will not deal with devils — the one clause enforced absolutely.
elements.wants: Keep diabolism out of the Order at any cost.
elements.as_thread: Suspicion of diabolism falls on a magus — investigated without mercy.

elements.name: Molest not the faeries
elements.summary: A magus will not molest the faeries, lest their vengeance fall on others.
elements.wants: Avoid drawing faerie wrath onto the Order.
elements.as_thread: A faerie's vengeance for a slight threatens the whole covenant.

elements.name: Scry not upon members of the Order
elements.summary: A magus will not use magic to scry upon members of the Order — enforced with surprising rigor.
elements.as_thread: An accusation of scrying on a sodalis must be answered at Tribunal.

elements.name: Abide by Tribunal decisions
elements.summary: A magus will abide by decisions made by fair vote at Tribunal; refusing punishment triggers a Wizard's March.
elements.wants: Bind the Order to its own law.
elements.as_thread: A Tribunal vote or punishment must be enforced — or defied.
